notification.name: Review Notification
notification.template:
<#assign title_en_US = serviceContext.getAttribute("title_en_US")!"">
You have a new article/edit to review! It was submitted by ${userName} on the article titled "${title_en_US}".

notification.name: Review Completion Notification
notification.template: Your submission has been reviewed and the reviewer ${transitionName} your submission.

notification.name: Review Notification Email
notification.template:
<#assign articleURL = serviceContext.getAttribute("articleURL")!""> <#assign title_en_US = serviceContext.getAttribute("title_en_US")!""> Hello Reviewer,

You have a new article/edit to review! It was submitted by ${userName} on the article titled "${title_en_US}". Please click here to review: ${articleURL}.

Thanks,
The Document Team

condition.name: check
